input_text: A man did have a car. The cat slept on the velvet sofa. Paul, a carpenter, carried a box. A village road was narrow. Muggles cannot disappear. Winona is a sheep. John is glad. The song was sung by Mary. Foxes cannot fly. Unexpectedly, the door opened. Probably Tallinn is in Estonia. If John is glad, then Mike is not glad. The red straw is 10 meters long. Smith, entered the room. The cake was eaten by the child. The brother of the friend of Eve arrived. If X1 is a grandfather of Y1, Y1 is a grandchild of X1. The book was read by Sara. Is Mike glad?
